---
title: "Matches"
---

```{r}
source("R/load_data.R")
fixtures <- load_fixtures()
results <- load_results()
matches <- dplyr::left_join(fixtures, results, by = "match_id")
```

```{r}
reactable::reactable(
  matches,
  searchable = TRUE,
  filterable = TRUE,
  defaultPageSize = 20,
  bordered = TRUE,
  columns = list(
    match_id = reactable::colDef(name = "Match"),
    group = reactable::colDef(name = "Group"),
    home_team_de = reactable::colDef(name = "Home"),
    away_team_de = reactable::colDef(name = "Away"),
    home_goals = reactable::colDef(name = "Home goals"),
    away_goals = reactable::colDef(name = "Away goals"),
    status = reactable::colDef(name = "Status")
  )
)
```
